name: cinder
description: A Svelte 5 component library and design system focused on accessibility, theming, and per-component tree-shaking.
author: Steve Kinney <hello@stevekinney.net>

scripts.clean: rm -rf dist coverage tsconfig.tsbuildinfo cinder-*.tgz tmp fixtures/node-consumer/node_modules fixtures/node-consumer/dist fixtures/sveltekit-consumer/node_modules fixtures/sveltekit-consumer/.svelte-kit fixtures/sveltekit-consumer/build
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run validate && bun run build
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.check.json && bunx svelte-check --workspace src --tsconfig ../tsconfig.json --threshold error
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run validate:workflow && bun run validate:consumer
